tasks.label: ensure-admin-8080
tasks.command: $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $listener) { Start-Process -FilePath py -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8080' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }; Write-Output 'HTTP server ready on http://localhost:8080';
